summary: TownServe iteration 2 retest after main agent fixed the @townserve.test TLD bug. Seed emails now use @townserve.in (non-reserved), logger hoisted to top of server.py, login screen demo hint updated, test_credentials.md updated. Backend pytest: 29/29 PASS (100%). Frontend Playwright e2e on 390x844: seeded provider login -> /provider-dashboard, admin panel + verify toggle, customer register -> home -> category -> provider -> book (COD) -> 'Pending' badge in My Bookings, and provider /register -> /provider-dashboard all PASS. No critical or high-priority issues remaining.

minor.issue: passlib still emits cosmetic warning 'module bcrypt has no attribute __about__' on each startup. Functional but noisy. Pin bcrypt<4 or migrate to bcrypt directly to silence.
Accepts booking_id as query param instead of JSON body. Works (returns 503 by design until Razorpay keys provided) but is an unusual contract. Consider moving to path or body for clarity.

issues: Continuous console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' from react-native-web. Cosmetic only — should be cleaned up by replacing pointerEvents prop with style.pointerEvents in custom components or upgrading react-native-web.

action_items: (Optional) Pin bcrypt<4 in backend/requirements.txt to silence passlib __about__ warning.
(Optional) Replace pointerEvents prop usage with style.pointerEvents to remove react-native-web deprecation warning.
(Optional) Move /api/payments/create-order booking_id from query param to request body for cleaner API contract.
critical_code_review_comments: All previously-flagged criticals are resolved: seed TLD fixed to @townserve.in, logger hoisted to top of server.py, demo credentials in login.tsx and /app/memory/test_credentials.md aligned with seeded data.
JWT_SECRET in backend/.env is still a placeholder ('townserve_super_secret_change_me_in_prod_2026') — must be rotated before any non-preview deployment.
/api/admin/providers/{id}/verify takes verify as a query bool — frontend (admin/index.tsx line 111) sends booleans correctly. Works but unconventional.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_townserve_api.py (updated 3 hard-coded .test emails to .in so the suite is green)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 4 mandated e2e flows (seeded provider login, admin panel + verify toggle, customer register->book COD->Pending, provider register routing)

seed_data_creation: Each test run registers a fresh provider (test_provider_<uuid>@townserve.in) and customer (test_customer_<uuid>@townserve.in) via /api/auth/register. UI test 3 also registers a customer_<rand>@townserve.in and creates one COD booking against seeded provider Ramesh Kumar. These are NOT cleaned up between runs (acceptable for dev DB).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All TownServe MVP flows are green end-to-end. Razorpay path is a hard 503 by design until keys are provided — when keys land, add online-payment tests (create-order returns 200 + razorpay order id; verify endpoint marks booking paid). Useful real testIDs: login-email-input/login-password-input/login-submit-button, goto-register-button, register-{name,email,password,phone}-input, role-customer-button/role-provider-button, register-submit-button, category-{name-lower-kebab}, result-{providerId} (search), book-{serviceId} (provider detail), address-input/notes-input/pay-cod/pay-online/confirm-booking/modal-ok (book screen), admin-tab-{overview|providers|bookings}, verify-{providerId}, edit-profile-button.
rca_of_issue: Iteration 1 RCA was: Pydantic EmailStr rejected the seeded RFC2606 reserved TLD .test, blocking all 8 seeded provider logins and the documented test customer. Main agent fixed it by switching seed domain to @townserve.in in server.py (line 657), updating /app/memory/test_credentials.md, and updating the demo-account hint in app/login.tsx. Also hoisted logger to top of server.py (lines 27-28). Verified by re-running pytest suite (29/29) and Playwright e2e flows.
